    Index

    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    U

    undoMove() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Undoes a move, restoring the state before the last performed move, if there is a undo move.
    undoMove() - Methode in Klasse persistance.History
    Undoes the last move by popping it from the undo stack and pushing it onto the redo stack.
    undoMoves - Variable in Klasse persistance.GameStateData
     
    undoMoves - Variable in Klasse persistance.History
     
    update() - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    This method gets called, whenever the board gets updated (by its observable).
    update() - Methode in Schnittstelle view.Observer
    Gets called when the Observable this observer is registered to notifies all observers of a change.
    updateErrorPrompt(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.GUIPrompt
    Updated the prompt in the case an error occurs.
    updateGamePrompt(PlayerEntity, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.GUIPrompt
    Updates the game prompt based on the current player's phase and name.
    updateGUIErrorPrompt - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
     
    updateRemovePrompt(PlayerEntity, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.GUIPrompt
    Updates the prompt for removing a piece.
    updateStatus(String, Color) - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    Updates the text displaying the current game status.
    updateTimer(int) - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    Updates the text displaying the remaining time to perform a move.
    useFiggerMill(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Attempts to find a move for the given player that completes an almost-formed mill by transferring a stone from another fully-formed mill.
